debug_info.goal:
case inr
A B : Islander
hAB : Islander.Said A (Islander.isKnave A ∨ Islander.isKnave B)
hA : Islander.isKnave A
this : ¬(Islander.isKnave A ∨ Islander.isKnave B)
⊢ Islander.isKnight A ∧ Islander.isKnave B

failed_attempts:
have hn : ¬A.isKnave := by
      intro h
      exact this (Or.inl h)
    have hK : A.isKnight := notisKnave_isKnight (A := A) hn
    exact ⟨hK, (this (Or.inr ·)).elim⟩

have hB : B.isKnave := by
      have hnot : ¬ (A.isKnave ∨ B.isKnave) := this
      have : ¬ B.isKnave := by
        intro hBk
        exact hnot (Or.inr hBk)
      exact notisKnave_isKnight B this |> (fun hBk => False.elim (knight_said hAB hBk (Or.inl hA)))
    exact ⟨notisKnave_isKnight A (isKnight_notisKnave hA), hB⟩

have hB : B.isKnave := by
      have hnot : ¬(A.isKnave ∨ B.isKnave) := knave_said hAB hA
      have : ¬B.isKnave := by
        intro hBk
        exact hnot (Or.inr hBk)
      exact (notisKnave_isKnight (A := B) this).elim
    exact ⟨notisKnave_isKnight (A := A) (isKnight_notisKnave hA), hB⟩

have hn : ¬ (A.isKnave ∨ B.isKnave) := knave_said hAB hA
    have hB : B.isKnave := (not_or.mp hn).2
    exact ⟨notisKnave_isKnight A hA, hB⟩

have hn : ¬(A.isKnave ∨ B.isKnave) := this
    have hna : ¬A.isKnave := by
      intro ha
      exact hn (Or.inl ha)
    have hAk : A.isKnight := notisKnave_isKnight A hna
    have hnb : ¬B.isKnave := by
      intro hb
      exact hn (Or.inr hb)
    have hBk : B.isKnight := notisKnave_isKnight B hnb
    exact (not_isKnight_and_isKnave A ⟨hAk, hA⟩).elim

have hB : B.isKnave := by
      have hn : ¬ (A.isKnave ∨ B.isKnave) := this
      have hn' : ¬ B.isKnave := by
        intro hB
        exact hn (Or.inr hB)
      exact (notisKnave_isKnight (A := B) hn')
    exact False.elim (isKnave_notisKnight (A := B) hB (said_knight hAB (Or.inr hB)))

have hn : ¬ (A.isKnave ∨ B.isKnave) := this
    have hAn : ¬ A.isKnave := by
      intro ha
      exact hn (Or.inl ha)
    have hBn : ¬ B.isKnave := by
      intro hb
      exact hn (Or.inr hb)
    have hB : B.isKnight := notisKnave_isKnight (A := B) hBn
    have hAk : A.isKnight := notisKnave_isKnight (A := A) hAn
    exact ⟨hAk, notisKnight_isKnave (A := B) (isKnight_notisKnave hB)⟩

have hnot : ¬(A.isKnave ∨ B.isKnave) := knave_said hAB hA
    have hnB : ¬ B.isKnave := by
      intro hB
      exact hnot (Or.inr hB)
    have hBk : B.isKnight := notisKnave_isKnight (A := B) hnB
    have hnA : ¬ A.isKnave := isKnight_notisKnave hBk
    have hAk : A.isKnight := notisKnave_isKnight (A := A) hnA
    have hOr : A.isKnave ∨ B.isKnave := knight_said hAB hAk
    have hB : B.isKnave := by
      cases hOr with
      | inl hA' => exact (hnA hA').elim
      | inr hB' => exact hB'
    exact ⟨hAk, hB⟩

have hAKnight : A.isKnight := notisKnave_isKnight A (by
      intro hAKnave
      exact this (Or.inl hAKnave))
    exact (isKnight_notisKnave hAKnight hA).elim
have hAK : A.isKnight := notisKnave_isKnight A (isKnight_notisKnave hAK? sorry)

have hB : B.isKnave := by
      have hn : ¬(A.isKnave ∨ B.isKnave) := knave_said hAB hA
      have : ¬A.isKnave := by
        intro hAn
        exact hn (Or.inl hAn)
      have := isKnight_or_isKnave B
      cases this with
      | inl hBk =>
          exact (not_isKnight_and_isKnave B ⟨hBk, (notisKnight_isKnave (A := B) (by
            intro hBn
            exact hn (Or.inr hBn)))⟩).elim
      | inr hBn =>
          exact hBn
    exact ⟨notisKnave_isKnight A (isKnight_notisKnave hA), hB⟩

have hnB : ¬B.isKnave := by
      intro hB
      exact this (Or.inr hB)
    have hAKnight : A.isKnight := by
      apply notisKnave_isKnight
      intro hAnKnave
      exact this (Or.inl hAnKnave)
    exact ⟨hAKnight, notisKnight_isKnave (A := B) (by
      intro hBKnight
      have hBKnave : ¬B.isKnave := isKnight_notisKnave hBKnight
      exact hBKnave (notisKnight_isKnave (A := B) (by
        intro hBKnight'
        exact hBKnave (notisKnight_isKnave (A := B) (by
          intro hBKnight''
          exact hBKnave (by
            have : False := this (Or.inr (notisKnight_isKnave (A := B) (by
              intro hBKnight'''
              exact hBKnave (isKnight_notisKnave hBKnight'''))))
            exact False.elim this))))))⟩

have hn : ¬(A.isKnave ∨ B.isKnave) := this
    have hB : B.isKnave := (not_or.mp hn).right
    have hAk : A.isKnight := notisKnave_isKnight A (not_or.mp hn).left
    exact ⟨hAk, hB⟩

have hnA : ¬ A.isKnight := isKnave_notisKnight hA
    have hnOr : ¬ (A.isKnave ∨ B.isKnave) := notknight_said hAB hnA
    have hB : B.isKnave := (not_or.mp hnOr).right.elim
    exact ⟨notisKnave_isKnight A (not_or.mp hnOr).left, hB⟩

have hAk : ¬A.isKnave := isKnight_notisKnave (notisKnave_isKnight A hA) 
    have hB : B.isKnave := by
      by_contra hBn
      have hBk : B.isKnight := notisKnave_isKnight B hBn
      have : (A.isKnave ∨ B.isKnave) := Or.inr (isKnight_notisKnave hBk)
      exact this this
    exact ⟨notisKnave_isKnight A hA, hB⟩

have hn : ¬ (A.isKnave ∨ B.isKnave) := this
    have hnA : ¬ A.isKnave := by
      intro hAn
      exact hn (Or.inl hAn)
    have hAk : A.isKnight := notisKnave_isKnight A hnA
    have hOr : A.isKnave ∨ B.isKnave := knight_said hAB hAk
    cases hOr with
    | inl hAn => exact (hnA hAn).elim
    | inr hBn => exact ⟨hAk, hBn⟩

have hnOr : ¬(A.isKnave ∨ B.isKnave) := knave_said hAB hA
    have hBn : ¬ B.isKnave := by
      intro hB
      exact hnOr (Or.inr hB)
    have hBk : B.isKnight := notisKnave_isKnight B hBn
    exact (not_isKnight_and_isKnave A ⟨notisKnave_isKnight A hnOr, hA⟩).elim
successful_attempts:
have hn : ¬(A.isKnave ∨ B.isKnave) := this
    have hA' : ¬A.isKnave := (not_or.mp hn).1
    exact False.elim (hA' hA)

have hA' : ¬ A.isKnave := by
      intro hAk
      exact this (Or.inl hAk)
    have hAk : A.isKnight := notisKnave_isKnight (A := A) hA'
    have hB : B.isKnave := by
      have : A.isKnave ∨ B.isKnave := knight_said hAB hAk
      cases this with
      | inl hAn => exact (hA' hAn).elim
      | inr hBn => exact hBn
    exact ⟨hAk, hB⟩

have hn : ¬(A.isKnave ∨ B.isKnave) := this
    have hnA : ¬A.isKnave := by
      intro h
      exact hn (Or.inl h)
    have hK : A.isKnight := notisKnave_isKnight hnA
    exact (hnA hA).elim

have hn : ¬(A.isKnave ∨ B.isKnave) := this
    have hnk : ¬A.isKnave := by
      intro hAk
      exact hn (Or.inl hAk)
    have hAk : A.isKnight := notisKnave_isKnight (A := A) hnk
    have hBk : B.isKnave := by
      have hOr : A.isKnave ∨ B.isKnave := knight_said hAB hAk
      cases hOr with
      | inl hAk' => exact (hnk hAk').elim
      | inr hBk' => exact hBk'
    exact ⟨hAk, hBk⟩
